name: Archtis Limited
analysis: AR9 has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 67% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.0920, stop A$0.0673, target A$0.1150 (0.93:1) — then trail it.
